zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Stewart of Scotland於1453年5月16日出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林時，她的父親James II Stewart King of Scotland22歲，母親Maria van Gueldres22歲。她於1467年4月26日與Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran在蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1488年5月16日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾漢密爾頓享年35歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾漢密爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Stewart of Scotland于1453年5月16日出生在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林时，她的父亲James II Stewart King of Scotland22岁，母亲Maria van Gueldres22岁。她于1467年4月26日与Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran在苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1488年5月16日在苏格兰藍納可爾漢密爾頓享年35岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾漢密爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Stewart of Scotland was born on 16 May 1453, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, James II Stewart King of Scotland, was 22 and her mother, Maria van Gueldres, was 22. She married Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran on 26 April 1467, in Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 16 May 1488, in Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 35, and was buried in Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Stewart of Scotland est née le 16 mai 1453, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, James II Stewart King of Scotland, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Maria van Gueldres, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran le 26 avril 1467, à Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 mai 1488, à Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Stewart of Scotland am 16. Mai 1453 in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James II Stewart King of Scotland 22 und ihre Mutter Maria van Gueldres 22. Sie hat am 26. April 1467 in Lanarkshire, Scotland Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. Mai 1488 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Stewart of Scotland è nata il il 16 maggio 1453 nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, sua padre, James II Stewart King of Scotland, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Maria van Gueldres, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran il 26 aprile 1467, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 maggio 1488, nel Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Stewart of Scotlandが1453年5月16日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで生まれた時，父James II Stewart King of Scotlandは22歳，母Maria van Gueldresは22歳であった。1467年4月26日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアでSir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年5月16日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアハミルトンで35歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアハミルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Stewart of Scotland(이)가 1453년 5월 16일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James II Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria van Gueldres(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1467년 4월 26일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 5월 16일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 함이턴에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 함이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.16 May 1453–16 May 1488: 16 de maio de 1453–16 de maio de 1488
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Stewart of Scotland nasceu em 16 de maio de 1453, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, James II Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Maria van Gueldres, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran em 26 de abril de 1467, em Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de maio de 1488, em Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Stewart of Scotland родилась 16 мая 1453 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James II Stewart King of Scotland было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maria van Gueldres, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran 26 апреля 1467 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 мая 1488 г. в местности хамилтон, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности хамилтон, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.16 May 1453–16 May 1488: 16 de mayo de 1453–16 de mayo de 1488
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Stewart of Scotland nació el 16 de mayo de 1453, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, James II Stewart King of Scotland, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Maria van Gueldres, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Boyd 1st Earl of Arran el 26 de abril de 1467, en Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1488, en Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
